source_jobs.title: Partnership Director
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!




THE ROLE

To support our continued growth, Nabla is expanding its team and seeking a Partnership Director to manage existing strategic reseller partnerships to drive revenue, accelerate implementation, and expand market reach. You will enable our partners to effectively sell and implement Nabla’s solutions, driving mutual growth and success.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Strategy Development: Creating plans to drive partnership sales, setting targets, and expanding the partner adoption amongst their clients.

 - Partner Onboarding Enablement: Create and deliver comprehensive onboarding tools for partners, focusing on product knowledge, sales positioning, and training/support best practices to maximize performance

 - Drive Sales and Adoption: Collaborate with partner sales teams to help close/win deals, troubleshoot any existing partner issues and ensure they have the tools needed to succeed in their sales efforts. Co-develop materials, including presentations, product demos, case studies, and other collateral to aid partners in their sales process.

 - Market Insights: Analyze market trends and partner feedback to refine enablement strategies and identify opportunities for growth

 - Relationship Management: Acting as the primary point of contact, resolving conflicts, and nurturing long-term, productive partnerships with key stakeholders across the partner organization.

 - Performance Tracking: Measuring KPIs, monitoring, and reporting on partner sales performance to identify areas for improvement and celebrate success together.

 - Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with marketing, product management, and other internal teams to ensure alignment and effective communication of product updates and promotions to partners




QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years of experience in managing partner strategy in Healthcare SaaS

 - Demonstrated success in developing and executing partner enablement programs

 - Exceptional communication and presentation skills. Uses structured reasoning to solve problems; delivers clear, meaningful insights through written and verbal communication

 - Strong analytical abilities to interpret data and market insights that inform strategic decisions

 - Proven project management skills with the ability to balance multiple priorities and initiatives

 - Highly collaborative, with a passion for cultivating and maintaining strong partner relationships

 - Proactive and self-motivated; takes ownership and acts with minimal supervision

 - Adapts quickly to changing priorities and processes while maintaining strong organizational discipline



Candidates must be currently authorized to work in the United States and must be able to maintain authorization to work in the United States without requiring employer sponsorship, now or in the future. For this role, the Company is not able to sponsor, transfer, or extend employment-based visas or other work authorization.




BENEFITS

Just like we’re dedicated to supporting doctors’ well-being

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!




THE BEST OF AI AT THE SERVICE OF HEALTHCARE

Nabla’s phenomenal traction is the result of 3 years of diligent product development.

Led by former Meta AI Research engineers, our team has consistently anticipated how AI can revolutionize healthcare delivery. Our Machine Learning team continually leverages the latest advancements to unlock AI’s full potential in healthcare.

Yann LeCun, Meta’s Chief AI Scientist and Turing award winner, is an advisor to Nabla.




ENGINEERING AT NABLA

Engineering at Nabla is lean, fast-moving, and deeply technical. Our teams span machine learning, native desktop applications, and platform infrastructure to deliver AI into clinical settings reliably and at scale.




YOUR TEAM

At Nabla, product development is led jointly by Engineering and Product, and organized into cross-functional squads, each focused on a specific product area. Squads bring together product managers, designers, engineers of different profiles, and domain experts, and operate with a high level of ownership.
As a full-stack Engineer, you’ll join one of these squads and contribute end to end to a specific part of the product.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Build and improve product features across web and desktop platforms

 - Contribute to back-end APIs and services to support product needs

 - Collaborate closely with Product, ML, and Design teams to take projects from idea to production

 - Write clean, maintainable code and contribute to team best practices

 - Learn from senior engineers and grow your skills across the stack


THE IMPACT

 - Nabla processes 10 billion tokens/month with LLMs

 - Every week, hundreds of thousands of clinical notes are automatically generated and synced with EHRs, saving thousands of hours for clinicians

 - Our applications support healthcare professionals in real-time clinical settings


YOUR DNA

 - 2+ years of industry experience in full-stack or software engineering

 - Solid foundations in computer science or related discipline

 - Comfortable with both back-end languages (Java, Kotlin, Go, Python, etc.) and front-end frameworks (React, Vue, etc.)

 - Curious, eager to learn, and motivated to grow in a fast-moving team

 - Write clean, maintainable code and care about quality

 - Communicate clearly in English

 - Bonus: experience with a native application language (Swift, Kotlin, Rust, C#, etc.)


OUR STACK

 - Frontend: TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Swift, Rust, Electron.

 - Backend: Kotlin / JVM, GraphQL, PostgreSQL.

 - ML & Infra: Python, PyTorch, Slurm, GCP, Terraform, Kubernetes.




WHERE YOU'LL BE BASED

Our offices are based in Paris 3e (Arts & Métiers). Remote policy: 1-2 days a week (with some flexibility). Possibility of working remotely 1-2 weeks once a year.




BENEFITS

Just like we’re dedicated to supporting doctors’ well-being, ensuring yours is a top priority. We firmly believe that by prioritizing your well-being, we support you to excel in your work.

Here are the benefits you get when joinin

At Nabla, product development is led jointly by Engineering and Product, and organized into cross-functional squads, each focused on a specific product area. Squads bring together product managers, designers, engineers of different profiles, and domain experts, and operate with a high level of ownership.
As a Senior Full-stack Engineer, you’ll join one of these squads and contribute end to end to a specific part of the product.






WHAT YOU'LL DO

As a Senior Full-Stack Engineer, you will take a leading role in building and scaling Nabla’s AI-powered healthcare platform. You will work across the stack—from back-end services to web, desktop, and mobile apps—and collaborate closely with Product, Design, and Machine Learning teams to deliver high-impact features that directly serve healthcare professionals.

You will:

 - Lead the design and development of new product features across web, mobile, and desktop platforms

 - Architect and optimize back-end APIs and services to support complex product needs

 - Drive cross-functional projects from idea to production, collaborating closely with Product, ML, and Design teams

 - Mentor and support junior engineers across the organization

 - Contribute to architecture discussions, technical strategy, and best practices

 - Proactively explore and adopt new technologies to keep our stack efficient and scalable

To give you a sense of the impact:

 - Nabla processes 10 billion tokens/month with LLMs

 - Every week, hundreds of thousands of clinical notes are automatically generated and synced with EHRs, saving thousands of hours for clinicians

 - Our applications support healthcare professionals in real-time, high-stakes clinical environments




YOUR DNA

 - You have 5+ years of industry experience in full-stack or software engineering roles

 - You have strong foundations in computer science or a related discipline

 - You’re proficient in both back-end languages (Java, Kotlin, Go, C++, Python, etc.) and front-end frameworks (React, Vue, etc.)

 - You have experience leading complex projects across the stack and collaborating across multiple teams

 - You write clean, maintainable code and have high standards for software quality

 - You are comfortable driving architectural decisions and mentoring othe

source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!




THE BEST OF AI AT THE SERVICE OF HEALTHCARE

Nabla’s phenomenal traction is the result of 3 years of diligent product development.

Led by former Meta AI Research engineers, our team has consistently anticipated how AI can revolutionize healthcare delivery. Our Machine Learning team continually leverages the latest advancements to unlock AI’s full potential in healthcare.

Yann LeCun, Meta’s Chief AI Scientist and Turing award winner, is an advisor to Nabla.




ENGINEERING AT NABLA

Engineering at Nabla is lean, fast-moving, and deeply technical. Our teams span machine learning, native desktop applications, and platform infrastructure to deliver AI into clinical settings reliably and at scale.




YOUR TEAM

At Nabla, product development is led jointly by Engineering and Product, and organized into cross-functional squads, each focused on a specific product area. Squads bring together product managers, designers, engineers of different profiles, and domain experts, and operate with a high level of ownership.
As a Senior FrontEnd Engineer, you’ll join one of these squads and contribute end to end to a specific part of the product.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

As a Senior Front-End Engineer, you will lead the development of high-impact user experiences across our web apps, desktop apps, browser extensions, and mobile interfaces. You will set the standard for UI quality and performance, and play a central role in evolving our design system, architecture, and tooling.

You will:

 - Build and lead the development of complex front-end features using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind

 - Drive architecture and technical decisions around shared UI libraries and front-end performance

 - Partner with Design to deliver intuitive, polished, and accessible experiences

 - Help scale our apps across web, mobile (Capacitor), and desktop (Electron)

 - Collaborate closely with Product, ML, and Back-End teams to ship full-stack features

 - Mentor other engineers and contribute to team-wide best practices

To give you a sense of the impact:

 - Nabla processes 10 billion tokens/month with LLMs

 - Every week, hundreds of thousands of clinical notes are automatically generated and synced with EHRs, saving thousands of hours for clinicians

 - Our apps support real-time use in high-stakes clinical environments




YOUR DNA

 - You have 5+ years of experience in front-end or full-stack development, with a focus on modern web technologies

 - You have deep expertise in React, TypeScript, CSS architecture, and performance optimization

 - You think in design systems and build for reusability and consistency

 - You thrive in cross-functional environments and love turning user needs into polished interfaces

 - You write clean, maintainable code and help others do the same

 - You communicate clearly in English

 - Bonus: experience with mobile apps, Electron, accessibility, or healthcare products




OUR STACK

 - Frontend: TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Swift, Rust, Electron.

source_jobs.description:

Nabla’s phenomenal traction is the result of 3 years of diligent product development.

Led by former Meta AI Research engineers, our team has consistently anticipated how AI can revolutionize healthcare delivery. Our Machine Learning team continually leverages the latest advancements to unlock AI’s full potential in healthcare.

Yann LeCun, Meta’s Chief AI Scientist and Turing award winner, is an advisor to Nabla.

 


ENGINEERING AT NABLA

Engineering at Nabla is lean, fast-moving, and deeply technical. Our teams span machine learning, native desktop applications, and platform infrastructure to deliver AI into clinical settings reliably and at scale.

 


YOUR TEAM

At Nabla, product development is led jointly by Engineering and Product, and organized into cross-functional squads, each focused on a specific product area. Squads bring together product managers, designers, engineers of different profiles, and domain experts, and operate with a high level of ownership.


As a Back-end Engineer, you’ll join one of these squads and contribute end to end to a specific part of the product.

 


WHAT YOU'LL DO

As a Back-End Engineer, you will play a critical role in scaling Nabla’s AI-driven healthcare platform. You will take ownership of key components of our back-end systems, collaborate closely with product and machine learning teams, and help shape the technical direction of our infrastructure.

You will:

 - Design, build, and evolve our server-side applications and APIs

 - Lead complex integrations with external partners, especially Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems

 - Continuously improve and optimize our back-end architecture and developer experience

 - Contribute to architectural discussions and influence long-term technical decisions

 - Collaborate closely across the team to deliver impactful end-to-end features

To give you a sense of the impact:

 - Nabla processes 10 billion tokens/month with LLMs

 - Every week, hundreds of thousands of clinical notes are automatically generated and synced with EHRs, saving thousands of hours for clinicians

 - Our APIs serve real-time workloads in high-stakes clinical environments


YOUR DNA

 - You have strong foundations in computer science or a related discipline

 - You demonstrate strong experience in back-end engineering, ideally within fast-paced, production-critical environments.

 - You’re proficient in one or more widely used back-end languages (Java, Kotlin, C++, Python, etc.)

 - You have experience designing, building, and maintaining scalable APIs and distributed systems (GraphQL and OpenAPI experience is a plus)

 - You are comfortable driving architectural decisions and technical strategy

 - You write clean, maintainable code and have high standards for software quality

 - You communicate clearly in English

 - Bonus: experience with cloud infrastructure, security/compliance, or healthcare data standards (FHIR)


OUR STACK

 - Frontend: Ty

source_jobs.title: Growth Marketing Director
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!




THE BEST OF AI AT THE SERVICE OF HEALTHCARE

Nabla’s phenomenal traction is the result of 6 years of diligent product development.

Our team counts former Facebook AI Research engineers who anticipated the way AI could transform healthcare delivery. Our Machine-Learning team is continually leveraging the latest advancements in the field to unlock the full potential of AI in healthcare. Not only that, Yann LeCun, Meta’s Chief AI Scientist and AI Godfather, is an advisor to Nabla.




THE ROLE

Nabla is growing fast and we’re just getting started. To keep up the momentum, we’re looking for a Growth Marketing Director to join our team and lead marketing efforts that will first focus on Mid-Market segment: large physicians groups up to 400 providers, then expand into Enterprise and other verticals. Your mission: attract new customers, improve every step of their journey, and help steer our strategy with sharp, data-driven insights.

You’ll take full ownership of our core marketing channels from paid acquisition to email nurture to integrated campaigns with one goal: generate qualified leads, speed up our sales pipeline, and help more clinicians discover how Nabla is changing the way they work.

This is a strategic and hands-on role. You won’t just set the strategy you’ll execute it. You’ll run experiments, launch and optimize campaigns, test new angles, analyze results, and move fast. Whether it’s rolling out a new paid campaign or launching a product GTM, you’ll adapt, iterate, and aim for impact every time.

You’ll report and work directly with our VP Marketing alongside the rest of the Marketing team and Delphine Groll, the Co-Founder and COO of Nabla. This is a highly cross-functional role, with strong collaboration across the company especially with:

 - You’ll primarily partner with Priscilla, our VP of Sales, and the Mid-Market Sales team to ensure marketing and growth efforts are tightly aligned with field priorities and adapt quickly based on real-time feedback.

 - You’ll also partner with Customer Success to turn happy users into advocates, strengthen retention, and scale referrals through smart, simple programs.

Responsibilities

 - Lead and execute digital-first programs that attract, convert, and nurture leads through the customer journey.

 - Set up and scale our email marketing from scratch: build and automate lifecycle email journeys including onboarding, re-engagement, and nurture flows, using segmentation, behavioral triggers, and continuous A/B testing to boost engagement and conversion.

 - Launch, manage, and continuously improve performance campaigns on social media and search platforms that are perfectly tailored to the right audiences and personas.

 - Design and grow targeted ABM programs to connect meaningfully with decision-makers in our highest-value accounts.

 - Brief and collaborate with design and content teams to create high-converting ad creatives, landing pages, and email assets that reflect Nabla’s brand and resonate w

source_jobs.title: Senior Security Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!




THE BEST OF AI AT THE SERVICE OF HEALTHCARE

Nabla’s phenomenal traction is the result of 3 years of diligent product development.

Led by former Meta AI Research engineers, our team has consistently anticipated how AI can revolutionize healthcare delivery. Our Machine Learning team continually leverages the latest advancements to unlock AI’s full potential in healthcare.

Yann LeCun, Meta’s Chief AI Scientist and Turing award winner, is an advisor to Nabla.




SECURITY AT NABLA

Our SaaS runs entirely on Google Cloud and handles highly sensitive healthcare data, so security is core to everything we do. You'll work directly with our Lead Security Engineer, to build and run our detection & response capability from the ground up and to strengthen security well beyond it.

This is a hands-on, high-impact role. It has a strong SOC/SIEM core but it is deliberately a security engineer role, not a pure SOC analyst role: you'll regularly cross into application, platform/cloud and corporate security, and you'll own problems end-to-end rather than hand them off.

If you're pragmatic and hands-on, love building systems from scratch, and want your work to protect patients' most sensitive data, this role is for you.




YOUR TEAM

We're building a dedicated security engineering team, and we're looking for an exceptional Senior Security Engineer | Detection & Response to be one of its founding members.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Detection & Response — your core focus

 - Own our SIEM-of-record end-to-end; take it from deployed to operated: finish and harden log-source onboarding (GCP audit logs, Okta, Google Workspace, GitHub, endpoint telemetry) and own normalization, ingest health and the operating rhythm.

 - Build detection-as-code: grow the first high-signal rules into a versioned, peer-reviewed rule set (Sigma / YARA-L / scheduled queries) mapped to MITRE ATT&CK and tuned hard against false positives.

 - Drive MTTD down to minutes on the attack paths that matter; identity abuse, service-account impersonation, bulk data access, CI/CD compromise.

 - Incident response: rehearse playbooks, lead investigations and forensics, and support breach-notification workflows with the compliance team.

 - Run the cloud-findings triage loop (Security Command Center / CNAPP)

Platform, Cloud & Application Security

 - Harden our Google Cloud estate (IAM least privilege, org policies, VPC Service Controls, GKE security, Cloud Armor) and codify everything in Terraform.

 - Secure the CI/CD pipeline and SDLC (SAST, dependency and secrets scanning, supply-chain controls) and contribute to threat modeling of new features, including our AI/LLM surfaces.

Corporate Security (with IT)

 - Strengthen the identity plane with IT — Okta policy hardening, phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2/passkeys), SSO/SCIM coverage, joiner-mover-leaver automation — and route EDR and email-security telemetry into your detections.


YOUR DNA

 - 5–8+ years in security engineering, including at least 2–3 years hand

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager - Ambient Speech
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!



The best of AI at the service of healthcare

Nabla's phenomenal traction is the result of 3 years of diligent product development. Led by former Meta AI Research engineers, our team has consistently anticipated how AI can revolutionize healthcare delivery. Our Machine Learning team continually leverages the latest advancements to unlock AI's full potential in healthcare.

Yann LeCun, Meta's Chief AI Scientist and Turing award winner, is an advisor to Nabla.


Product at Nabla

Product development at Nabla is led jointly by Engineering and Product and organized into cross-functional squads. As a Product Manager in the ambient speech-to-text squad, you will join a team focused on speech and ambient intelligence, contributing end-to-end to the evolution of our real-time clinical audio stack.


Your Team

As a Product Manager on the Ambient Speech team, you will own the product strategy and execution for the voice intelligence layer at the heart of Nabla's AI assistant. Ambient speech is the foundation of the clinician experience: it determines what Nabla can reliably hear, understand, and turn into useful documentation and downstream actions.

You will work in a cross-functional squad alongside ML engineers, software engineers, designers, data scientists, and clinical experts. Together, you will turn complex speech and audio capabilities — including transcription, speaker diarization, language detection, and real-time processing — into products that clinicians trust and use every day.


What you'll do

 - Own the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for Nabla's ambient speech and voice intelligence capabilities

 - Develop a deep understanding of how clinicians use Nabla in real patient encounters, including the moments where audio quality, speaker attribution, latency, or transcription accuracy affect trust and adoption

 - Translate clinician needs and business priorities into clear product opportunities, requirements, and success metrics for the speech squad

 - Partner closely with ML engineers to define the highest-impact improvements across speech recognition, diarization, voice activity detection, principal-speaker detection, language detection, custom vocabulary, and real-time audio processing

 - Make thoughtful product trade-offs between accuracy, latency, cost, reliability, and time to market

 - Define and monitor product quality metrics that connect technical speech performance with clinician outcomes — such as perceived transcription quality, note quality, edit rates, successful capture rates, activation, retention, and support burden

 - Lead discovery efforts with clinicians, customers, and internal stakeholders to identify unmet needs across specialties, languages, modalities, and care settings

 - Design experiments and launch plans that validate new capabilities quickly while protecting the quality and reliability of the core clinical experience

 - Work with Design to create simple, intuitive experiences that make sophisticated speech

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!




THE ROLE

The Sales Development Manager will play a key role in driving top-of-funnel growth, helping Nabla hit our revenue goals by leading our SDR team. In this fast-paced, high-growth environment, you’ll combine strategy, coaching, and data-driven insights to optimize outreach strategies, develop early-career sales talent, and deliver measurable revenue impact.




RESPONSIBILITIES:

Lead & Develop a High-Performing Team

 - Motivate, coach, and mentor SDRs to achieve and exceed pipeline generation goals.

 - Ensure SDRs confidently articulate Nabla’s value proposition across buyer personas and market segments.

 - Create an environment that promotes accountability, collaboration, and continuous learning.

Drive Pipeline and Revenue Growth

 - Design and execute outbound prospecting strategies that consistently produce high-quality opportunities.

 - Collaborate with Marketing and Sales Leadership to align outbound cadences, campaigns, and positioning.

 - Leverage data and market insights to refine messaging and outreach tactics for maximum effectiveness.

Implement Data-Driven Coaching & Insights

 - Analyze activity, conversion, and performance metrics to identify opportunities for improvement.

 - Provide structured, actionable feedback to improve prospecting efficiency and pipeline quality.

 - Celebrate achievements, identify skill gaps, and drive ongoing development.

Foster a Winning Team Culture

 - Cultivate a sense of ownership, curiosity, and enthusiasm within the team.

 - Encourage collaboration, innovation, and peer learning.

 - Lead by example—modeling empathy, professionalism, and a passion for solving real challenges in healthcare.

Streamline and Scale Processes

 - Partner with Revenue Operations and Marketing to refine workflows, automate tasks, and improve reporting visibility.

 - Continuously optimize lead routing, prospecting sequences, and qualification criteria for scalable success.




QUALIFICATIONS:

We are seeking candidates with:

 - 2+ years experience managing SDR teams, in a SaaS healthcare organization, with a proven record of building high-performing outbound teams.

 - Self-motivated, adaptable, and comfortable managing a remote team.

 - Track record in outbound prospecting, lead generation, and sales pipeline creation.

 - Excellent communication, coaching and interpersonal skills with a passion for developing early-career talent into confident, effective sales professionals.

 - A collaborative spirt with experience working cross-functionally with Marketing, Sales, and Enablement to deliver joint success.

 - Comfortable guiding teams through evolving strategies, market changes, and playbooks while maintaining morale and performance.

 - Proven ability to analyze data, identify trends, and drive process improvements.



Candidates must be currently authorized to work in the United States and must be able to maintain authorization to work in the United States without requiring employer sponsorship, now or in

source_jobs.title: Senior Back-end engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!




THE BEST OF AI AT THE SERVICE OF HEALTHCARE

Nabla’s phenomenal traction is the result of 3 years of diligent product development.

Led by former Meta AI Research engineers, our team has consistently anticipated how AI can revolutionize healthcare delivery. Our Machine Learning team continually leverages the latest advancements to unlock AI’s full potential in healthcare.

Yann LeCun, Meta’s Chief AI Scientist and Turing award winner, is an advisor to Nabla.




ENGINEERING AT NABLA

Engineering at Nabla is lean, fast-moving, and deeply technical. Our teams span machine learning, native desktop applications, and platform infrastructure to deliver AI into clinical settings reliably and at scale.




YOUR TEAM

At Nabla, product development is led jointly by Engineering and Product, and organized into cross-functional squads, each focused on a specific product area. Squads bring together product managers, designers, engineers of different profiles, and domain experts, and operate with a high level of ownership.
As a Senior Back-end Engineer, you’ll join one of these squads and contribute end to end to a specific part of the product.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

As a Senior Back-End Engineer, you will play a critical role in scaling Nabla’s AI-driven healthcare platform. You will take ownership of key components of our back-end systems, collaborate closely with product and machine learning teams, and help shape the technical direction of our infrastructure.

You will:

 - Design, build, and evolve our server-side applications and APIs

 - Lead complex integrations with external partners, especially Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems

 - Continuously improve and optimize our back-end architecture and developer experience

 - Guide architectural discussions and influence long-term technical decisions

 - Collaborate closely with Machine Learning, Product, and Front-End teams to deliver impactful end-to-end features

 - Mentor junior engineers and contribute to scaling the engineering culture

To give you a sense of the impact:

 - Nabla processes 10 billion tokens/month with LLMs

 - Every week, hundreds of thousands of clinical notes are automatically generated and synced with EHRs, saving thousands of hours for clinicians

 - Our APIs serve real-time workloads in high-stakes clinical environments


YOUR DNA

 - You have strong foundations in computer science or a related discipline

 - You demonstrate strong, senior-level experience in back-end engineering, ideally within fast-paced, production-critical environments.

 - You’re proficient in one or more widely used back-end languages (Java, Kotlin, C++, Python, etc.)

 - You have deep experience designing, building, and maintaining scalable APIs and distributed systems (GraphQL and OpenAPI experience is a plus)

 - You are comfortable driving architectural decisions and technical strategy

 - You write clean, maintainable code and have high standards for software quality

 - You communicate clearly in English

source_jobs.title: VP Finance
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!



Finance & Legal at Nabla

Finance and Legal at Nabla sits at the centre of every major decision the company makes. As VP Finance, you'll be the CFO's right hand — owning financial operations end-to-end while touching Legal, HR, and Admin. This is a senior cross-functional role that operates at the intersection of Finance, Strategy, and People, and a rare opportunity to work in close proximity to the CFO with a clear path to become one.

 

Your Team

You'll report directly to the CFO and work closely with executives across Finance, HR, Legal, and Operations, and partner with Sales, Customer Success, and the Board on strategic topics.

 

What you'll do

FP&A & Accounting

 - Manage the FP&A and Accounting teams
   
   - Own the review of the accounting function: month-end close, statutory reporting, audit coordination, and compliance with French and US GAAP requirements
   
   - Review and challenge with FP&A team the company's financial model, forecast, and budget; track actuals vs. plan and deliver actionable insight to leadership

 - Participate in board and investor reporting — be the guardian of Nabla's financial information and a trusted, credible voice with investors and the Board

 - Manage cash flow management, working capital optimization, and treasury oversight

Business partnering

 - Participate in Nabla's pricing strategy: structure pricing frameworks, lead pricing discussions with the Sales team, and support negotiations with key customers

 - Help design and manage incentive plans for Sales and Customer Success — aligning compensation structures with business objectives

People & Equity

 - Partner with the People team on salary benchmarking, compensation decisions, and headcount planning

 - Oversee equity management end-to-end, including BSPCE, BSA, and secondary transactions

 - Advise employees and leadership on equity mechanics, tax implications, and liquidity events

Legal & Admin oversight

 - Supervise day-to-day legal and administrative operations, coordinating with legal counsel as needed

 - Review vendor contracts, partnership agreements, and operational documentation, in connection with the Head of Procurement and the Sales teams

 - Ensure compliance with applicable French corporate, employment, and financial regulations

 

The impact

 - Nabla has raised significant capital to date and is on a strong growth trajectory — you'll own the financial backbone of that story

 - Every commercial agreement, vendor contract, and strategic partnership that powers our 10 billion tokens/month of LLM processing runs through this function

 - You'll work hand-in-hand with the CFO and have a clear path to step into that role — directly enabling the clinical impact we have for hundreds of thousands of healthcare professionals each week

 

Your DNA

 - Business school graduate (top-tier Grande École or equivalent)

 - 5 years in Audit or Transaction Services at a top-tier firm — you have an exceptional technical accounting and finance fou

source_jobs.title: SRE / Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NABLA

We are a team of entrepreneurs, clinicians and engineers committed to bringing back joy to the practice of medicine.



Together with a community of clinician innovators, we’ve harnessed the best of machine learning science to develop Nabla: the leading AI assistant that’s restoring the human connection at the heart of healthcare. By streamlining clinical documentation, Nabla is helping clinicians focus on what matters most - patient care. Today, over 100,000+ clinicians across 130+ healthcare organizations trust Nabla to support how they deliver care every day.



We’re at the start of an ambitious journey: Ambient listening, dictation, coding, and command capabilities are all converging into a proactive assistant that intuitively streamlines clinical and financial workflows.



Backed by a recent $70M Series C, we’re hiring to build the next generation of clinical AI and improve the lives of clinicians and patients everywhere.

This is a great time to join us!




YOUR TEAM

Our AI ambient documentation product is used by 100,000+ physicians across the US and EU, automatically generating clinical notes in real time during patient encounters and syncing them directly with EHR systems.



Product development at Nabla is organized into cross-functional squads, each owning a specific area end-to-end. You'll be joining the Platform squad, which owns the infrastructure and engineering foundations that the rest of the company builds on.



We process billions of tokens monthly, serve real-time APIs in high-stakes clinical environments, and handle hundreds of thousands of note syncs with EHR systems every week, at a scale that keeps growing.



As we scale, reliability engineering is becoming a first-class discipline within the team, and you'll have real ownership in defining how we operate and build for resilience.






WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own production reliability - take meaningful accountability for the stability, robustness, and performance of our platform across the full stack

 - Own and scale the on-call culture - take what's already in place and bring it to the next level: strengthen our runbooks, sharpen escalation paths, and build incident response processes that can scale with the team

 - Instrument everything - develop and improve our monitoring, alerting, and observability stack so that issues surface before they reach users, and our engineers can diagnose them fast

 - Drive the SRE roadmap - work with the Platform squad and Engineering leadership to define and prioritize the reliability investments that matter most, from SLOs to chaos engineering

 - Make engineers faster - reduce toil and improve the developer experience: better tooling, clearer feedback loops, smoother deployments

 - Collaborate across squads - partner with back-end, ML, and front-end engineers to embed reliability best practices into how we build, not just how we operate






YOUR DNA

 - Demonstrates strong, senior-level experience in SRE, infrastructure, or back-end engineering, ideally within fast-paced, production-critical environments.

 - Hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure (GCP preferred; AWS or Azure experience considered if you're ready to learn a new stack)

 - You've been part of a structured on-call process: alerting policies, runbooks, incident post-mortem, escalation flows

 - Strong software engineering fundamentals - you write clean, maintainable infrastructure-as-code and are as comfortable reviewing a Terraform PR as you are debugging a live incident

 - Autonomy is your default mode - you can identify what needs to be done, prioritize it yourself, and drive it to completion without being managed step by step

 - You communicate clearly and effectively with engineers and leadership across distributed teams, including during incidents, even outside regular working hours

 - Bonus: experience with Kubernetes, GCP-native tooling (Cloud Run, GKE, Pub/Sub), PostgreSQL at scale, or security/compliance in a hea

notes: Nabla is a healthcare AI assistant company with a strong engineering focus.
